prompt: Tap left hole card before final medium-stack action.
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The left hole card is the anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the private-card cue this decision is built around first.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left hole card is the target hole card because the final medium-stack action must stay tied to the correct hand reference.
